summary: A day on which you kept your circle small and tended it close.

voice_notes.notes: Low universalism reads as scope restricted to people the player can actually affect today. Never call this selfish; tending close is a real practice.

signal_moments: the news cycle you turned the sound off on
the friend you wrote to in detail
exemplars.output: You turned the sound off on a news cycle that had nothing in it for you to do. The friend you wrote to, you wrote to in detail. The size of the circle you tended today was a small one, on purpose, and the tending was the better for being thorough.
exemplars.notes: Names the choice as a scope decision rather than a moral one.
